facebook.content:
"Worship is at the very core of our spiritual journey, and we're honored to have you join us at Increasing Faith Ministries. Every First Saturday, we gather in person at 24301 Telegraph in Southfield, MI at 12 Noon to lift our voices in praise and adoration.

If you can't make it in person, we invite you to join us online every Monday through Friday at 8:15 AM for our Hour of Power on Facebook Live. Come experience the joy and freedom that comes from communing with the Father in worship.
facebook.fullPost:
"Worship is at the very core of our spiritual journey, and we're honored to have you join us at Increasing Faith Ministries. Every First Saturday, we gather in person at 24301 Telegraph in Southfield, MI at 12 Noon to lift our voices in praise and adoration.

If you can't make it in person, we invite you to join us online every Monday through Friday at 8:15 AM for our Hour of Power on Facebook Live. Come experience the joy and freedom that comes from communing with the Father in worship.

Join us for worship
https://increasingfaith.net/visit.html

#KingdomLiving #IFM #IncreasingFaith

instagram.content: "Draw near to God and He will draw near to you. Join us in person on the 1st Saturday of every month at 12 Noon at 24301 Telegraph in Southfield MI. Or, experience the power of corporate worship daily, 8:15 AM, Mon-Fri on Facebook Live. We can't wait to worship with you."
